landing.badge: Think it. Build it. Run it.
landing.headline: THINK IT. BUILD IT.
landing.storyTitle: From description to a shippable site in three steps
landing.storySubtitle: Harness owns generation and verification; you own direction and iteration.
landing.step1Body: Explain the site goals and style in natural language. It becomes structured requirements and design intent — not small talk.
landing.step2Body: Fixed engineering nodes: planning, design system, page implementation, build verification, and auto-repair. Real Next.js code, not screenshot mocks.
landing.step3Body: Chat to modify, preview, and refine with Design Mode until it is ready to deliver.
landing.pipelineHint: 8 core nodes — each with clear inputs and outputs; failed builds can auto-repair.
landing.communitySubtitle: See what others are shipping with Open-OX.

home.title: Open-OX — AI website builder
home.description: Describe your idea in natural language and get a runnable Next.js site in minutes. Generate, iterate in Studio, and ship.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade to get the capacity that matches how much you build.
pricing.checkoutSuccess: Payment received. Credits usually appear within a few seconds — refresh if the balance looks stale.
pricing.checkoutCancel: Checkout canceled. No charge was made.
pricing.freeFeat1: About one generate + a few edits (usage varies)
pricing.proFeat2: No daily wipe on your Pro pool
pricing.faq1a: Credits measure AI build usage — generate and modify runs. Cost scales with how much work the model does (tokens), then converts to credits. Design Mode edits that write source locally without an LLM do not spend credits.
pricing.faq2a: New accounts get 12 welcome credits once — roughly enough for one full generate and a few modify turns (actual usage varies). When you run out, top up or subscribe on the pricing page. Design Mode local edits stay free.
pricing.faq3a: Pro is priced by monthly credit capacity (100 / 200 / 400). You pick the pool size that matches how much you build. Credits are added to your balance each billing cycle.
pricing.faq4a: Welcome and top-up credits stay on your balance until spent. Pro monthly credits stay while your subscription is active. There is no daily Free grant and no daily wipe of your balance.
pricing.faq5q: What happens if I cancel Pro?
pricing.faq5a: You keep any remaining balance. After cancel, your plan returns to Free (no daily grants). Buy a top-up or resubscribe when you need more credits.
pricing.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits. Top up or upgrade to continue.
pricing.badgeTip: Click to top up or upgrade
pricing.badgeTipPro: Click to manage subscription or buy a pack
pricing.badgeTipLow: Balance is low — top up to keep generating
pricing.stripeMissing: Stripe is not configured in this environment. Checkout buttons stay disabled until price IDs are set.

changelogPage.title: Changelog
changelogPage.subtitle: New features, UX polish, and engineering improvements.
changelogPage.entryLangNote: Entry details below are written primarily for the engineering team (mixed Chinese/English).

settings.appearanceDescription: Choose your interface theme and display language.
settings.integrationsDescription: See sites pushed to your own Vercel account, and jump back to Studio to edit. Separate from community Publish Preview.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The link may be broken, or the address is wrong.

onboarding.creditsSoftPromise: New accounts get 12 welcome credits once — roughly enough for one full generate and a few edits (actual usage may vary).
onboarding.designTip: Design Mode is on: click any text or element in the preview, then Apply (no credits).
onboarding.designUnavailable: Pick-to-edit isn't available on this preview yet. Try Design Mode again after generate settles.
onboarding.vibeSoftGateHint: Pick a visual direction for a steadier first generate — or skip and use defaults.
onboarding.tourWelcomeTitle: From one sentence to a previewable site
onboarding.tourWelcomeBody: Open-OX isn’t an image mock generator. Describe the goal — the pipeline builds a real Next.js project you can preview, click-edit, and iterate. This short tour covers the controls that matter.
onboarding.tourConversationTitle: The stream above is your build history
onboarding.tourConversationBody: Vibe clarification, plan confirm, and the generate run all land here. Scroll up anytime to revisit what the pipeline did.
onboarding.tourModifyTitle: Keep iterating in the input below
onboarding.tourModifyBody: After generate, describe changes in the bottom composer and press Enter. Use it for bigger layout edits — prefer Design Mode for quick copy/style tweaks.
onboarding.tourPanelsBody: Topology shows the pipeline. Code is the real source. Preview is the live site. Watch Topology while building; switch to Preview to judge the result.
onboarding.tourPreviewBody: You’re looking at a real project, not a collage. After generate, rebuild anytime, open in a new tab, or capture a cover for your list.
onboarding.tourDesignBody: When preview is ready, tap Design pick, select a headline or block, and write styles/copy back to source. Save Modify for larger layout changes.
onboarding.tourFinishTitle: Welcome credits cover a serious first try
onboarding.tourFinishBody: New accounts get 12 credits once — roughly one full generate and a few edits (usage varies). Design Mode local edits stay free. Write your first brief when you’re ready.
onboarding.workspaceTourWelcomeTitle: After sign-in, this is your home base
onboarding.workspaceTourWelcomeBody: Workspace is your project hub: describe an idea above to start building, manage projects and credits on the left. This short tour covers the entry points.
onboarding.workspaceTourPromptTitle: Describe the site in one sentence
onboarding.workspaceTourPromptBody: Write a brief here and hit Build to open Studio and generate a previewable Next.js project. More specific briefs land better on the first run.
onboarding.workspaceTourNavTitle: “Start building” jumps back to the prompt
onboarding.workspaceTourNavBody: Use the sidebar for projects, community, integrations, and docs. Start building scrolls to and focuses the prompt.
onboarding.workspaceTourPublishedBody: After you publish a project to the community from Studio, it shows up here — separate from drafts in My projects.
onboarding.workspaceTourCommunityBody: Explore public previews for inspiration. Open details — and if the author enabled Remix, you can fork and iterate.
onboarding.workspaceTourCreditsTitle: Balance lives bottom-left — open pricing anytime
onboarding.workspaceTourCreditsBody: New accounts get welcome credits. Generate spends credits; Design Mode pick-edits don’t. Top up from here when you’re low.
onboarding.workspaceTourFinishBody: After your first generate, Studio has a short preview + Design Mode lesson. Write a brief and build.
